title: Senior Doctor - Abbott India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Abbott India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
